response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of fullstack experience, including recent TypeScript/Node.js product work and hands-on AI-agent infrastructure development (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) — a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, pairing, CI/CD), cloud and container experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), and database breadth (MongoDB, MySQL) align well with the role. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no stated Nest.js experience, frontend history leans toward Ember.js over React, and Kotlin exposure is absent, though Java is present.
strengths: Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) matching a required skill
Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js background with cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, and Kubernetes experience
Strong engineering-craft credentials: TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD, testing workshops and open-source test tooling
concerns: No stated Nest.js experience, a primary stack technology
Frontend experience favors Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one role
No Kotlin and limited recent Java, the secondary backend stack

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited React depth
